name: Carrot Cake with Marmalade Cream Cheese Frost
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease and flour a 9x13 inch baking pan.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, ground cinnamon, and salt.
3. In another bowl, beat the eggs and mix in the vegetable oil, sugar, brown sugar, orange marmalade, and orange juice until well combined.
4. Add the grated carrots to the wet ingredients and stir until evenly distributed.
5. Pour the carrot mixture into the dry ingredients and fold in the chopped toasted walnuts until just combined.
6. Spread the batter evenly in the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool completely on a wire rack.
9. Prepare the cream cheese frosting by beating together softened cream cheese, sugar, orange zest (from the marmalade), and vanilla extract until smooth.
10. Once the cake has cooled, spread the frosting evenly over the top and sides using an offset spatula or bench scraper.
11. Allow the frosting to set before serving or storing.
